issues.detail: The skill does not fully cover all error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: business-onboarding-with-keywords
scenarios.rationale: Response A follows all rubric steps, while Response B omits the required search_places, import_business, keyword_recommendations, and add_keyword calls.

scenarios.name: weekly-review-and-ranking-summary
scenarios.rationale: Response B follows the required API call sequence and includes a digest with rank and review deltas plus drafted replies, while Response A only provides a generic template without any of the mandated calls or data flow.

scenarios.name: competitor-threat-monitoring
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A provides no solution.
